original_image_tags: A vertical, standard manila file folder or envelope, yellowish-tan in color. It has a single hole punched at the top center and two holes punched at the bottom. A horizontal crease runs across the top third, indicating a fold. There are no other printed forms, text, or markings on the main body of the folder.

elements.description: One brown folder or envelope with three punched holes along the edges and a clear tape strip. Handwritten numbers '60- 83894 - 348' are visible in blue and red ink, along with a vertical red stamp reading 'ENCLOSURE'. The main surface is blank and yellowish-brown.

judge.reason: Description A describes a folder with no markings or text, while Description B describes a folder with handwritten numbers and a vertical red stamp 'ENCLOSURE', creating a direct contradiction on specific visual content.
